news.title: Global markets: Australian shares rebound as banks and consumer stocks rally
news.description: Australian shares rebounded on Wednesday, driven by gains in banks and consumer stocks, as softer economic data eased rate hike expectations. The S&P/ASX 200 index rose 0.6%, with markets now pricing in earlier rate cuts. Miners and gold stocks, however, faced declines.

news.title: Global markets: Japan's Nikkei slides as Gulf tensions prompt shift out of high-flying tech stocks
news.description: Japan's Nikkei share average fell 1.89% on Wednesday, with technology and AI-related stocks leading the decline. Renewed Middle East tensions and rising domestic interest rates prompted investors to shift focus to relative valuations.  Wholesale inflation quickened to its fastest pace in three years

news.title: Gold falls below pre-duty-hike levels as overseas prices drop
news.description: Gold prices in India have fallen significantly, reaching their lowest point since early May. This price drop is expected to encourage more buyers to return to the market.
